verses.text: Keima la pen thumanna leh thutan'na la ahi hi. Nang ka hong sak ding hi; Topa aw, kong sak ding hi
Paubaan'na a omlo thu bek ka kin ding hi. Cik ciangin kei kiangah hong pai ding na hi hiam? Lungsim hoihna tawh ka inn sungah ka gamta ding hi
A sia na peuhmah ka deih kei ding hi. Lamkhial mite' nasepna ka mudah a, tuate tawh ka kisukha kei ding hi
Lungsim kawina ka deih hetkei a, siatna, ngaihsutin zong ka neikha kei ding hi
A vengte a gensia sim mite ka susia ding a, kiphatsakna, kihihsakna lungsim a nei mi ka thuak kei ding hi
Leitungah a thuman mite kei tawh a om theihna dingin maipha ka pia ding a, paubaan'na omloin a gamta mi in keima na hong sem ding hi
Khemna a zang mi peuhmah keima inn-ah tenglo ding a, zuauthu a gen mi peuhmah keima omna-ah om thei nawnlo ding hi
Zingsang simin leitunga migilote khempeuh ka susia ding a, Topa' khuapi panin siatna bawlte khempeuh ka khenkhia ding hi.
